T0173.title: Fast Track Query
T0173.definition: An illegal channel for data queries that provides extremely fast results, often within minutes.
T0173.description: 快线是黑产上游的高效数据获取方式，通常依赖公权系统或自动化接口，能迅速返回目标信息。它被用于紧急查档需求，如实时定位、即时身份核验等。快线的存在表明黑产已渗透进高速信息网络，极大提升了犯罪效率。
T0173.usageExample: "Bank card transaction records, any bank, stable. Express line departs Sunday evening, returns Monday or Tuesday."
